title: Multiple Projects on 1 High Level Board
excerpt: We have 3 independent annual projects we want to track from a high level on one board (CRAFT Field Days, Stateline Farm Beginnings, Take Root). I used the demo videos and came up with the board below. The trouble is that…

posts.author: Goli-Z (Goli Ziolek)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have 3 independent annual projects we want to track from a high level on one board (CRAFT Field Days, Stateline Farm Beginnings, Take Root). I used the demo videos and came up with the board below. The trouble is that the calendar view doesn’t tell me what phase of the project I’m looking at, just the name of the project. Any suggest to alter my board or an altogether new format?

Screen Shot 2020-09-17 at 1.14.25 PM2124×1366 236 KB
Screen Shot 2020-09-17 at 1.15.19 PM1486×1276 47 KB
